issue.body:
**Spec:** docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md

Add `pd_book_tools.scannos` owning the data model + storage + API for scanno
(scanner error correction) rules and candidates. SQLite RuleLibrary for the global
library; JSON sidecar CandidateStore per book. Atomic `promote()` transaction
moves a candidate into a rule with evidence trail.

**Gates:** all pd-prep-for-pgdp Stage 13 slices (S13-A through S13-D).
**UI consumers:** `pd-ui/.../wf05b/scanno-configure.jsx`, `wf05b/scanno-promote.jsx`,
`wf05b/DISCUSSION.md`.

nodes.description: Design issue with a spec doc
nodes.name: kind:spec

issue.title: Spec: scannos rule and candidate module

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md
Section: §6.1 ScannoRule schema + §6.2 ScannoCandidate schema
Tracks: #209

Define ScannoRule (id, pattern, sug, match: 'literal'|'word-final'|'regex', scope: 'global'|'project'|'book', auto, hits, books, contributors, added, updated, conflict?, note?) and ScannoCandidate (id, token, sug, src: 'ocr'|'rule'|'manual', hits, pages, conf, status, firstSeen, note) dataclasses. Field-level unit tests.
issue.title: scannos: ScannoRule + ScannoCandidate dataclasses

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md
Section: §6.4 SQLite schema
Tracks: #209

Implement RuleLibrary backed by SQLite (WAL mode, indexed on pattern/scope/auto). Methods: load/save/query/list rules. Default library path via platformdirs (~/.local/share/pd-suite/scannos/rules.db). Unit tests covering schema + query paths.
issue.title: scannos: SQLite RuleLibrary (global rules store)

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md
Section: §6 Decision (per-book sidecar)
Tracks: #209

Implement CandidateStore backed by a per-book JSON sidecar (matches existing pd-* sidecar pattern). Methods: load/save/list candidates by status. Unit tests.
issue.title: scannos: JSON CandidateStore (per-book sidecar)

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md
Section: §6.3 Key API surface
Tracks: #209

Implement scan_page(page, rules) for literal + word-final matching producing ScannoCandidates, and promote(candidate) as an atomic transaction that moves a candidate into a global rule (idempotent). Unit tests covering both.
issue.title: scannos: scan_page() + promote() API

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-scannos-module.md
Section: §7 Implementation Plan + §8 Test Plan
Tracks: #209

End-to-end integration test: scan a synthetic page → produce candidates → promote one → verify it appears in the global library with evidence trail. Cover concurrency / re-promote idempotency / conflict warnings.
issue.title: scannos: promotion-flow integration test + unit tests
